name: UK Dwellings Started (all sectors)
notes: ONS "Indicators of house building, UK" workbook, sheet 1a (UK, quarterly, all sectors), §2.B B7. The free UK-wide successor to MHCLG's live tables (Table 213), which sit behind www.gov.uk/assets.publishing.service.gov.uk — outside this pipeline's egress policy — whereas the ONS release is on ons.gov.uk. Fetched two-step via the beta /data alias -> XLSX by sources/ons_housing.py (dates-down, Period column = quarter ranges like "Jan - Mar 1978", value col "Started - All Dwellings"). Permanent dwellings started is the UK construction leading indicator (starts lead completions and GDP construction output). Verified live 2026-07-16: 184 obs 1978-Q1 -> 2025-Q4 = 38010 dwellings.
